description: ID3 (Einstein) — Algebraic Discrete Physics. All of modern physics derives from a purely algebraic, discrete theory. The Physics/ Lean module, computational experiments, and the triumvirate.
header:
# EGPT — ID3: Einstein's Idea (Algebraic Discrete Physics)

> All of modern physics derives from a purely algebraic, discrete theory.
> This file contains all primary artifacts for Idea #3.
> For the full framework: https://eabadir.github.io/EGPT/IDEAS.md
>
> Key claim: Continuous field theory can be replaced by discrete, integer-indexed computation.
> Einstein suspected this ('letter to Besso, 1954') but died without the mathematical form.
> EGPT provides it: RealityIsComputation.lean + GravitySim + FRAQTL DevSDK.
> The triumvirate: formal proof + analytical paper + computational experiment.

files.note: BE systems are classically computable via RECT
PI as rational phase, not transcendental — discrete algebra
Analytical derivation: P(interaction) = m₁m₂/4r², G as dimensional scaling
Narrative: deriving gravity from random walks
